# AGENTS.md

## Required reading

Before making changes, read:

1. `.agent/global-claude.md`
2. This repository's `README.md`
3. Any package-level `AGENTS.md` files in the working directory tree

## AI Agent Behavior

Follow the local guidance in `.agent/global-claude.md`.

Key rules:

- Think before coding
- Make surgical changes
- Preserve existing behavior unless the task requires a change
- Do not perform broad refactors without explicit approval
- Run the smallest relevant validation before reporting completion
- Clearly state what changed, what was tested, and what was not tested

## Source of shared guidance

The shared upstream version is maintained at:

https://github.com/longieirl/ai-tools/blob/main/.agent/global-claude.md

The local repository copy is authoritative for this project.
